    1. createMemento()
    2. restoreMemento(T)

Interface MementoManager<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of memento produced and consumed by this manager.
All Known Implementing Classes:
Board, Game, Market, Player
public interface MementoManager<T>
Generic interface for classes that support the Memento pattern. An implementor acts as an Originator: it can snapshot its state into a memento and later restore itself from one.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    createMemento()
    Creates a memento capturing the current state of this object.
    void
    restoreMemento(T memento)
    Restores this object's state from the given memento.

  • Method Details

    • createMemento

      T createMemento()
      Creates a memento capturing the current state of this object.
      Returns:
      a snapshot of the current state.

    • restoreMemento

      void restoreMemento(T memento)
      Restores this object's state from the given memento.
      Parameters:
      memento - the snapshot to restore from.
